CREATE TABLE test_hash (id UInt32, name String, timestamp DateTime);
SELECT farmHash64(id, name) AS FarmHash FROM test_hash WHERE id > 1;
WITH (SELECT name FROM test_hash WHERE id = 1) AS subquery_name SELECT farmHash64(subquery_name, 10) AS FarmHash;
SELECT farmHash64(array(toString(id), name, toString(timestamp)), rand()) AS FarmHash FROM test_hash;
SELECT farmHash64(toUInt8(255), toFloat32(1.5), toDate('2022-05-15')) AS FarmHash;
CREATE TABLE hash_test (key String, value UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY key;
SELECT farmHash64(key, value) AS FarmHash FROM hash_test;
SELECT farmHash64(name, toUInt64(id), 'constant') AS FarmHash FROM test_hash WHERE id <= 2;
